properties.Steps: In Enterprise Settings, enter  Sample-727011-1960. Text and images should show in 7 slots. PDF. Note, the PDF is wrong for the Title page. On 23 Feb 2022, the Sample branding was changed so that page has a single Little Zebra Books logo on the bottom of the title page.

properties.Test Case: Choose ONE particular branding and examine the following: - Check logos appear correctly in the 1) Edit view 2) PDF 3) EPUB 4) Bloom Reader. See the "Branding Screenshots" sheet in this file. [See settings/Bloom Enterprise. See the folder browser/branding/X for hints on what should appear for each branding. Images should appear where their names suggest. Json settings should be applied to new books.] The brandings should be checked in generated books, not just in the Bloom preview. See notes at https://docs.google.com/document/d/1IRwsfHnvmR0AnhiJFgp8EOrFAhXmF1U3tOGe-Y7p2oA/edit?usp=sharing. Remember to set the appropriate xmatter, if the branding has a custom one associated with it. (JT 6.3: as far as I can find in the subscriptions doc, there is no longer a current Kyrgyz branding. This makes it difficult to test all the things in the notes. I tried the Little Zebra branding, which has obvious custom stuff on the bottom of the front cover, the bottom of the title page, and the top of the outside back cover. It does not, however, have hyperlinks.)
properties.Steps:
Choose ONE particular branding and examine the following:

- Check logos appear correctly in the 1) Edit view 2) PDF 3) EPUB 4) Bloom Reader.  See the "Branding Screenshots" sheet in this file. [See settings/Bloom Enterprise. See the folder browser/branding/X for hints on what should appear for each branding. Images should appear where their names suggest. Json settings should be applied to new books.]  The brandings should be checked in generated books, not just in the Bloom preview. See notes at https://docs.google.com/document/d/1IRwsfHnvmR0AnhiJFgp8EOrFAhXmF1U3tOGe-Y7p2oA/edit?usp=sharing. Remember to set the appropriate xmatter, if the branding has a custom one associated with it. (JT 6.3: as far as I can find in the subscriptions doc, there is no longer a current Kyrgyz branding. This makes it difficult to test all the things in the notes. I tried the Little Zebra branding, which has obvious custom stuff on the bottom of the front cover, the bottom of the title page, and the top of the outside back cover. It does not, however, have hyperlinks.)
